html:
For the in-game map, see Map.

Exclusive to:

“Contains map data of the survivor who created it. Used to share map information.”

-

The Map Scroll is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It requires 1 Feather Pencil and 1 Papyrus to craft and is found in the Cartography Filter. This tab can only be accessed while standing next to a Cartographer's Desk, therefore the Map Scroll can not be prototyped.

Upon examination, the character will say who drew the Map Scroll and on which day. The Map Scroll contains the data of the preparing player's Map at the time of the scroll's creation. When used by another player, the knowledge in the scroll will be added to the user's Map. Therefore, players can organize map exploration and gain quicker access to full map knowledge.

If the Map Scroll is created on the surface, it will not transfer any Caves map data and vice versa. Map Scrolls must be in the Caves to transfer cave map data and on the surface to transfer surface map data.

Map of Totally Uninhabited Island

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
The Map of Totally Uninhabited Island is given to the player by the Grainy Transmission on the Hermit Island in exchange for a Map Scroll after defeating Crystal Deerclops, Armored Bearger, and Possessed Varg.

When given to Crabby Hermit, she, alongside her Hermit Home, Bee Box, and Drying Racks, will teleport away to Moon Quay island. This is required in order to spawn the Celestial Revenant.

When read by the player, it functions identically to a normal Map Scroll.

Trivia

  • Map Scrolls were added in the A Little Fixer Upper update.

Gallery

  • A Map Scroll dropped on the ground.
  • A Caves Map Scroll.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Exclusive to:
“A blank map. Doesn't seem very useful.”
–Wilson
“Nothing's on it? I can burn it then, right?”
–Willow
“No little pictures! Just paper.”
–Wolfgang
“Blank as Abigail now.”
–Wendy
“CAN'T SCROLL”
–WX-78
“The potential of the blank page is paralyzing for some.”
–Wickerbottom
“Is it still a map if nothing's on it?”
–Woodie
“There's nothing to be gleaned from this.”
–Maxwell
“Mayhaps the ink is invisible!”
–Wigfrid
“There's nothing on it.”
–Webber
“A blank map. Full of potential.”
–Warly
“Findy Paper!”
–Wormwood
“There's nothin' on it.”
–Winona
“It doesn't really matter which way you go.”
–Wortox
“Where the pictures?”
–Wurt
“A map! ...With nothing on it.”
–Walter
“It's not a map yet, but it will be in the future.”
–Wanda
“Contains map data of the survivor who created it. Used to share map information.”
-

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cuộn Bản Đồ là một Vật Phẩm có thể chế tạo độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong A New Reign. Nó cần 1 Bút Chì Lông Vũ và 1 Giấy Cói để chế tạo và được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Bản Đồ. Tab này chỉ có thể được truy cập khi đứng cạnh Bàn của người vẽ bản đồ, do đó không thể tạo nguyên mẫu Cuộn bản đồ.

{{Scrapbook Info|Contains map data of the survivor who created it. Used to share map information.}}
The '''Map Scroll''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It requires 1 [[Feather Pencil]] and 1 [[Papyrus]] to craft and is found in the [[Cartography Filter]]. This tab can only be accessed while standing next to a [[Cartographer's Desk]], therefore the Map Scroll can not be prototyped.

Upon examination, the character will say who drew the Map Scroll and on which day. The Map Scroll contains the data of the preparing player's [[Map]] at the time of the scroll's creation. When used by another player, the knowledge in the scroll will be added to the user's Map. Therefore, players can organize map exploration and gain quicker access to full map knowledge.

If the Map Scroll is created on the surface, it will not transfer any [[Caves]] map data and vice versa. Map Scrolls must be in the Caves to transfer cave map data and on the surface to transfer surface map data.

{{clear}}
== Map of Totally Uninhabited Island ==
{{Object Infobox
|name = Map of Totally Uninhabited Island
|image = Map Scroll Dropped.png
|icon = Map_Scroll.png

|burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 15 sec.

|stack = Does not stack
|droppedBy = {{Pic|32|Grainy Transmission}}
|spawnCode = "mapscroll_tricker"
|durability = 1 use
}}
{{Rift Content|Lunar Rift}}
The '''Map of Totally Uninhabited Island''' is given to the player by the [[Grainy Transmission]] on the [[Hermit Island]] in exchange for a '''Map Scroll''' after defeating [[Crystal Deerclops]], [[Armored Bearger]], and [[Possessed Varg]].

When given to [[Crabby Hermit]], she, alongside her [[Hermit Home]], [[Bee Box/DST#Hermit Bee Box|Bee Box]], and [[Drying Rack/DST#Hermit Drying Rack|Drying Racks]], will teleport away to [[Moon Quay]] island. This is required in order to spawn the [[Celestial Revenant]].

When read by the player, it functions identically to a normal Map Scroll.
{{clear}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Map Scrolls were added in the ''[[A New Reign#September 1, 2016 - A Little Fixer Upper|A Little Fixer Upper]]'' update.
